meta.disclaimer: Community-built planning tool. Offers, restrictions and participation change - always verify with the course and the official program sites before playing.

mgcLevels.A: Valid anytime. Holidays and July 3-5 not included.
mgcLevels.B: Valid anytime Mon-Fri; Sat & Sun after 1 pm. Holidays and July 3-5 not included.
mgcLevels.C: Valid anytime Mon-Thu; Fri, Sat & Sun after 3 pm. Holidays and July 3-5 not included.
mgcLevels.D: Valid Mon-Thu, only on/before May 31 and on/after Sept 1. Holidays not included.
mgcLevels.E: Valid Mon-Thu before 11 am; Sat & Sun after 1 pm. Holidays and July 3-5 not included.
mgcLevels.F: Valid Mon-Fri after 12 pm; Sat & Sun after 2 pm. Holidays and July 3-5 not included.
mgcLevels.G: Discounted-rate course (not 2-for-1). Valid Mon-Thu. 4 rounds, up to 2 redeemed per visit; coupon = 1 round + half a power cart.

mgcCartLegend.4: Driving range included in green fee

pccTiers.1: Tier 1: No green-fee surcharge. Cart $23/18 or $15/9 if riding. Weekend/holiday blackout 7-11 am (cart required before 7 am wknd/holiday). Max 12 rounds/month/course. Shoulder-season surcharge Nov-Mar.
pccTiers.2: Tier 2: Mon-Thu cart $23/18, $15/9, or $10 walking surcharge. Fri-Sun & holidays $28 mandatory surcharge (cart included). Weekend/holiday blackout 7 am-12 pm. Max 12 rounds/month/course.
pccTiers.3: Tier 3: $33 surcharge every day (cart included if taken). Weekend/holiday blackout 7 am-12 pm. Max 12 rounds/month/course.
pccTiers.RESORT: Resort tier: $45 surcharge, limited to 6 rounds/month. Weekend/holiday blackout 7 am-12 pm.

meta.mgcCardNotes: 2026 card: $40. Digital card, each course accepts it 4 times. Ride-a-Round: one-time free golf for up to 4 people (cart rental required), Mon-Fri only, before May 15 or after Sept 15.
meta.pccMembershipNotes: $89 one-time joining fee + $65/month year-round. Max 12 rounds/month per course (Tier 1-3). Blackouts Sat/Sun/holidays: 7-11 am (Tier 1) or 7 am-12 pm (Tier 2+). Member ID card required.
